name: octo-oke-trace-to-new-pods
displayName: OCTO OKE — trace propagation into newly-added pods
description: Top-N traces touching k8s.pod.name values that are NOT in the operator-supplied baseline_pod_set parameter. Confirms that HPA-added pods are actually serving traffic + emitting correlated APM spans (vs. sitting idle behind the LB). Operator fills baseline_pod_set with the pre-scale pod names at apply time; see README for first_appear logic guidance.
queryString: service.namespace = 'octo_apm_demo' and k8s.pod.name not in ({baseline_pod_set}) | stats count() as span_count, min(timestamp) as first_appear by traceId, k8s.pod.name, service.name | sort -span_count | head limit = 50

parameters.name: baseline_pod_set
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of pod names that existed BEFORE the stress run (pre-scale baseline). Operator fills at apply time, e.g. "octo-drone-shop-abc,octo-drone-shop-def".

external_drilldowns.name: Phoenix
external_drilldowns.why: Trace-level evaluation view for runs hitting newly-scheduled pods.

external_drilldowns.name: OpenLIT
external_drilldowns.why: OTel-native trace view filtered by the same pod set.
